# Bug Report Template

**Title:** Short and clear bug title

| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| Bug ID | BUG-XXX |
| Module |  |
| Severity | Critical / High / Medium / Low |
| Priority | High / Medium / Low |
| Environment | Browser, OS, Build |
| Reported By |  |
| Status | Open |
| Related Test Case | TC-XXX |

1.
2.
3.

## Expected Result

What should happen?

## Actual Result

What actually happened?

## Evidence

Screenshot, video, logs, API response, or SQL result.

## Impact

Why does this matter to the user or business?
